name: BB:UBA : Successful File Transfer
notes: Detects successful file transfer, FTP and TFTP attempts.
bb_references: BB:UBA : Successful File Transfer on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event category for the event is one of the following Application.File Transfer, Application.FTP Opened, Application.TFTP Session Opened, Access.FTP Action Allowed
TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : Successful File Transfer on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Application.File Transfer, Application.FTP Opened, Application.TFTP Session Opened, Access.FTP Action Allowed
